data.description:
Repro (verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD): set-file-impact <id> '[42, "string"]' -> exit 0; get-file-impact -> [42, "string"]. Also '[{"reason":"no path"}]' accepted; set-verify-commands '[{"x":1}]' accepted. Help documents "JSON array of {path,reason} objects" / "{dd_id,dd_text,command}"; only array-ness is validated (non-JSON and non-array correctly rejected).

Source: ticket-lib-api.sh:1027-1036 (file_impact), :1194-1201 (verify_commands) — type check stops at array.

Impact: junk flows into show/list/--output llm payloads and (once the next-batch file-impact bug 1 is fixed) into the scheduler.

Fix: validate each element is an object with required string keys; exit 1 naming the offending index. RED tests for each malformed shape. Fix alongside or after the next-batch file-impact bug so the schema is enforced where it starts mattering.
data.title: set-file-impact/set-verify-commands accept arbitrary array elements (documented element contract unenforced)
